ASTM Type 2 DI Water (1 Gallon)

Our deionized water is produced via a multi-stage purification process to exceed the rigorous ASTM Type II standards. It is the "workhorse" grade for laboratories, providing the perfect balance of purity and value.

  • Resistivity: > 1.0 MΩ·cm
  • Conductivity: < 1.0 µS/cm
  • Total Organic Carbon: < 50 ppb
